title: AFI TradePlan v1 / SignalLevels v1 (District 2 M1 DRAFT)
description: DRAFT / NON-IMPLEMENTATION canonical trade-intent projection. Preserves CPJ trade intent (entry range, stop loss, take profits, leverage/venue/market-type hints) that is currently dropped at the CPJ→USS mapping. NUMBER POLICY: all prices and quantities are DECIMAL STRINGS, never IEEE-754 floats — raw JSON numbers are invalid for these fields (precedent: settlement draft's string-encoded integers). SignalLevels v1 is defined under #/definitions/signalLevels.
$comment: This schema captures intent as stated by the source signal. It defines no execution, routing, sizing, or settlement behavior.
x-afiPartOf: AFI District 2 — Canonical Data & Provenance Boundary (D2 M1)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: District 2 D-17 decision — authorizes D2 M1 only (afi-config schema drafts and tests)

x-afiOpenItems.TP-O1: Decimal precision/scale limits per venue/instrument — OPEN; the decimalString pattern fixes syntax only.
x-afiOpenItems.TP-O2: Venue id namespace/registry — OPEN; free-form hint string in this draft.

schema.description: Schema version identifier for TradePlan v1.

signalId.description: OPTIONAL stable unique identifier of the signal this trade plan belongs to (same id space as USS provenance.signalId).

levels.description: SignalLevels v1: entry, stop loss, and take-profit levels as decimal strings.

leverageHint.description: OPTIONAL suggested leverage as a decimal string (e.g. '5', '2.5').

marketTypeHint.description: OPTIONAL suggested market type (aligned with CPJ v0.1 extracted.marketTypeHint).

notes.description: OPTIONAL free-form notes on the trade intent as stated by the source.

decimalString.description: A non-negative decimal number encoded as a string (e.g. '42000', '42000.50'). Strings avoid IEEE-754 float precision loss; raw JSON numbers are invalid.

priceRange.description: An inclusive price range with decimal-string bounds.

sizePct.description: OPTIONAL percentage of the position to close at this level, as a decimal string (e.g. '50').

signalLevels.description: SignalLevels v1: the price levels stated by the source signal, using decimal strings throughout.

takeProfits.description: OPTIONAL take-profit targets, in source order.
